/Library/Developer/CommandLineTools/usr/bin/cc -I/opt/homebrew/opt/libomp/include -I/opt/homebrew/opt/flex/include -O3 -DNDEBUG -isysroot /Library/Developer/CommandLineTools/SDKs/MacOSX15.5.sdk -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names -L/opt/homebrew/opt/libomp/lib -L/opt/homebrew/opt/bison/lib -L/opt/homebrew/opt/flex/lib CMakeFiles/CThreadPool_example.dir/example.c.o -o CThreadPool_example  libCThreadPool_thpool.a
